subject: Urgent: Refund still pending
message: I am a premium member and requested a refund for my last subscription charge exactly 3 days ago. Since my tier should have priority, why hasn't it been processed within the standard window?

subject: PayPal Payment Security Delay
message: I just made a payment via PayPal but the funds aren't showing up yet. How many seconds is the mandatory security cooling-off period before the funds are allocated?

subject: Widget Pro Reset and Calibration
message: I am trying to reset my Widget Pro. How many seconds do I need to hold the RESET button, and what color should the LED blink to indicate it is ready for pairing?

subject: Domestic Express Courier Service
message: I want to use the Express Courier Service for my domestic order. What is the exact fixed fee for this service and what is the guaranteed delivery time in hours?

subject: Account Unlock Time
message: My account just got locked after some failed attempts. Since I am a premium member, how many minutes will it take for my account to automatically unlock?

subject: High-Value Transaction Verification
message: I tried to make a large purchase but it triggered a 'whisper' verification. What is the exact dollar threshold that triggers this manual verification process?

subject: International Shipping to Europe
message: I am shipping a heavy package (over 5kg) to Europe. Is there an additional surcharge I should be aware of, and what is the maximum transit time in days?
